experimentTitle: V and Inverted-V Curves of a Synchronous Machine
caption: Figure 3: Experiment setup of synchronous machine. The circuit shows the synchronous motor (3-phase stator connected to 220 V, 50 Hz, 3-phase variable AC supply through an MCB and power factor meter; stator ammeter Is in series) mechanically coupled to a DC generator (shunt field and armature; field ammeter If and voltmeter V in the field circuit; variable DC power supply for rotor field excitation through an MCB). The DC generator output is connected to a lamp load.
